\tzpentry{ID4798}{Text Torsion Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4798 introduces Text Torsion Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\tP(s) \\sim s^{-\\tau}, \\quad \\tau_{\\text{crit}} = \\frac{3}{2} \\otimes \\text{TZP Scaling}\n\\end{equation}
